text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm at the school store with Sakura
Chiyono O...
choice_data_list: Are you looking to buy origami paper?
Are you looking to buy origami paper?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I am! I want to try making some origami.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I recently received a fan letter that came with an
origami cherry blossom. I could tell how much
feeling the sender put into it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to fold something for them too
when I write a reply back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a regular Umamusume... There's nothing
spectacular about me that would catch anyone's
eye.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But still... there are people out there cheering for
me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Their words are so kind, it makes me want to cry
when I read them... They warm my heart and make
the fire in me burn brighter.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It all just feels like a dream.
choice_data_list: So what do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... I want to live up to their expectations.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to show my gratitude to my supporters. I
want to make the people cheering for me happy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to gift them my smile... A smile as beautiful
as a flower in bloom!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll become a flower as beautiful as the origami
cherry blossom I received!
choice_data_list: Then for starters, you'd better send that reply.
Then for starters, you'd better send that reply.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm thinking of sending them an even bigger
origami cherry blossom in return!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That way, they'll know I'm going to bloom into a
huge flower!
